result_treatment_sub: Kpeei solɔɣu pam ka paɣi tia

result_export_footer: Powered by AgroSense — Plant.id · Cursor · Khaya AI
error_unexpected_response: Server returned an unexpected response. Check Django logs.
error_network_prod_cross_origin: Cannot reach the API (wrong URL, CORS, or backend waking/sleeping on Render). Confirm VITE_API_BASE_URL has no typo; on Render set CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS to this site's exact https origin (and preview URLs if you use them). Retry after 30-60s on cold start.
error_network_prod_same_origin: Cannot reach the API. Same-origin /api should proxy via repo-root vercel.json. Update the rewrite destination to your Render URL, redeploy Vercel, or set VITE_API_BASE_URL to that URL and redeploy.
error_network_dev: Cannot reach the API. Local dev: (1) In backend: pip install -r requirements.txt && python manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:8000 (2) In frontend: npm run dev. Leave VITE_API_BASE_URL empty in frontend/.env so /api proxies to Django.
error_file_type: Tɔɣi jpg, png, naa webp gom bu.
error_no_results: Ka tia yi o. Tɔɣi gom bu si hyɛ.
history_empty: No scans yet. Scan your first plant!
history_empty_sub: Your past diagnoses will appear here.
history_clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all scan history?
settings_built_with: Built with Plant.id · Cursor · Khaya AI
lab_precision_body: Our models are trained on over 500,000 verified pathological samples of regional crops.
expert_insights_body: Receive instant organic treatment recommendations and preventative strategies.
camera_error_denied: Camera access denied. Please allow camera permissions and try again.

rightpanel_settings_desc: Pahima yuli ni preferences. Settings save automatically la wɔ device.
rightpanel_supported_langs_sub: UI mini AI diagnosis a wɔ labi
